perturbseq_stim.reagent: ImmunoCult human CD3/CD28/CD2 T Cell Activator (STEMCELL 10990, 25 ul/ml)

modality_caveat: ChIP stim = PMA/ionomycin (receptor-bypassing PKC/Ca2+ activation); Perturb-seq stim = CD3/CD28/CD2 (receptor-proximal). Overlapping but non-identical activation programs; treat as approximate activation-state match, not identical stimulus.
